particulars.description: F/H property k/a 114 hervey road london t/no's SGL28159 SGL150251 SGL99947 327152 SGL168715 291667 and LN31910 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.
